brief_justification: Paper A is a citizen-science environmental-education initiative whose 'machinery' is a pedagogical/community program (training students to collect, curate, and interpret air-quality and weather data), while Paper B is a cosmological clustering analysis using angular correlation functions, power spectra, galaxy bias, and HOD+NFW halo models cross-correlated with CMB lensing. There is no shared governing equation, estimation principle, or dynamical process; the only overlap ('data', 'monitoring/observation') is generic vocabulary, so no role-for-role mapping holds.
